TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Argentina hya' ga cyux maki' tay 34 00 S, 64 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2,780,400 sq km (maki' tay 8ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,736,690 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 43,710 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 43,886,748. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 53.90%, lhlahuy hya' ga 10.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 35.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Buenos Aires. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 25 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mauricio Macri, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Plahang hi' nbu Ka hum squliq pklahang nbu ru, ptyuw na sehu, ru pbetaqan ru plahang hi nbu na pawsian rmaw, hminas cyugal kbhun buying msqutux mtzywaw, cyugal ga sazin baq p'baq, phzinas smka na squliq ga sasisio mtyuaw. plahang hi' nbu kuoka mlahang kwaraq squliq, ana binah na squliq uzi, nanu yasa haki lhinhay na qalan, qzinuq na squliq ga khangun nay uzi. Smsum zywaw sinbilan Sibilant zywaw na Akntiy kahun ta Ocuo, pzyux kahun binah qlang na squkiq snsum nha zywaw pkcingay gaga na Alntiy. Quni haw'luis, bohs kmayan, squliq na Akntiy ga kman ke sibonya na squliq itali: "Krani nha minaki paliy na squliq na inkuko." lozi ga, squliq na kuwciaw qnzyat mtuyuw qnxan nha ga. mnglung cikay qanxan na gaga Akntiy la. Zmagan nniqun na ocuo krryax ga, wayay itali, siangciang, ru sbing pang, squliq Aknting smoya maniq nniqun na cinhyan uzim ru kriauw na nniqun, kwaraq smuling sueciaw pyanhniqun na qalang Aknting smuling sianm (Asado) ru loklo, loklo ga nbox na qetun. layan sianm yacung ru topu. Umita ga nbox na qetun, layan yacung laciaou waralng kblayan nha niwan snabu niqun qalang qani kian na talaha sianm htgan na cinbwanan alinh srara psuyx balay hisiam slingun na, Aknting pyangbalay ga na Itali kcing miy, guys hi ktuaw kacin, guys kacin, pyah na Itali ru hmyaq pyah skitu na miluku ga. Ktan krryax niqan pyanh sbing, tuangan pyahh ciawkli skitu na miluku ru bway giram, sinpamya balay nha uzi, qwau sgnaw Aknting ga pyang balay na cinbwanan, yasa qu pyang sgleng na maniqi sazi qa pyang nbun qu qalang Aknting ma'pek tolot csiacu sila satang ga syon kwaea qalang. Nnbun matay ga muci qutux nbun Aknting lozi, maki pqwasam, slayn llgam ru ana nanu na slayn. Hugal Aknting ga hminas balay hugal na qutux qalang, kbhul ga qelu pqan maki hugal qu squliq, mopu hupa na hugal kian smka na squliq na qalang, Musa maki cuygan kbhul mang na squlang maki hugal puinasailis, kwara squliq na puinasailis kaki qutux seng cuygam mang squliq. mntosa, Tukuma, lapulata, matpulata, sa'ta ru sngbe hmzinas miman mang squliq uzi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: arɣentina ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** s~ɕ, ** ** w na nan-meʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βuenos~ɕ aires~ɕ. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mauriʦ~ʨio maʦ~ʨri, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. plaħaŋ ħiʔ nβu ka ħum s~ɕquliq pklaħaŋ nβu ru, ptjuw na s~ɕeħu, ru pβetaqan ru plaħaŋ ħi nβu na paws~ɕian rmaw, ħminas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħun βujiŋ ms~ɕqutux mtzjwaw, ʦ~ʨjuɣal ɣa s~ɕazin βaq pʔβaq, pħzinas~ɕ s~ɕmka na s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕas~ɕis~ɕio mtjuaw. plaħaŋ ħiʔ nβu kuoka mlaħaŋ kwaraq s~ɕquliq, ana βinaħ na s~ɕquliq uzi, nanu jas~ɕa ħaki lħinħaj na qalan, qzinuq na s~ɕquliq ɣa kħaŋun naj uzi. s~ɕms~ɕum zjwaw s~ɕinβilan s~ɕiβilant zjwaw na akntij kaħun ta oʦ~ʨuo, pzjux kaħun βinaħ qlaŋ na s~ɕqukiq s~ɕns~ɕum nħa zjwaw pkʦ~ʨiŋaj ɣaɣa na alntij. quni ħawʔluis~ɕ, βoħs~ɕ kmajan, s~ɕquliq na akntij ɣa kman ke s~ɕiβonja na s~ɕquliq itali: "krani nħa minaki palij na s~ɕquliq na inkuko." lozi ɣa, s~ɕquliq na kuwʦ~ʨiaw qnzjat mtujuw qnxan nħa ɣa. mŋluŋ ʦ~ʨikaj qanxan na ɣaɣa akntij la. zmaɣan nniqun na oʦ~ʨuo krrjax ɣa, wajaj itali, s~ɕiaŋʦ~ʨiaŋ, ru s~ɕβiŋ paŋ, s~ɕquliq akntiŋ s~ɕmoja maniq nniqun na ʦ~ʨinħjan uzim ru kriauw na nniqun, kwaraq s~ɕmuliŋ s~ɕueʦ~ʨiaw pjanħniqun na qalaŋ akntiŋ s~ɕmuliŋ s~ɕianm (as~ɕa*o) ru loklo, loklo ɣa nβox na qetun. lajan s~ɕianm jaʦ~ʨuŋ ru topu. umita ɣa nβox na qetun, lajan jaʦ~ʨuŋ laʦ~ʨiaou waralŋ kβlajan nħa niwan s~ɕnaβu niqun qalaŋ qani kian na talaħa s~ɕianm ħtɣan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan alinħ s~ɕrara ps~ɕujx βalaj ħis~ɕiam s~ɕliŋun na, akntiŋ pjaŋβalaj ɣa na itali kʦ~ʨiŋ mij, ɣujs~ɕ ħi ktuaw kaʦ~ʨin, ɣujs~ɕ kaʦ~ʨin, pjaħ na itali ru ħmjaq pjaħ s~ɕkitu na miluku ɣa. ktan krrjax niqan pjanħ s~ɕβiŋ, tuaŋan pjaħħ ʦ~ʨiawkli s~ɕkitu na miluku ru βwaj ɣiram, s~ɕinpamja βalaj nħa uzi, qwau s~ɕɣnaw akntiŋ ɣa pjaŋ βalaj na ʦ~ʨinβwanan, jas~ɕa qu pjaŋ s~ɕɣleŋ na maniqi s~ɕazi qa pjaŋ nβun qu qalaŋ akntiŋ maʔpek tolot ʦ~ʨs~ɕiaʦ~ʨu s~ɕila s~ɕataŋ ɣa s~ɕjon kwaea qalaŋ. nnβun mataj ɣa muʦ~ʨi qutux nβun akntiŋ lozi, maki pqwas~ɕam, s~ɕlajn llɣam ru ana nanu na s~ɕlajn. ħuɣal akntiŋ ɣa ħminas~ɕ βalaj ħuɣal na qutux qalaŋ, kβħul ɣa qelu pqan maki ħuɣal qu s~ɕquliq, mopu ħupa na ħuɣal kian s~ɕmka na s~ɕquliq na qalaŋ, mus~ɕa maki ʦ~ʨujɣan kβħul maŋ na s~ɕqulaŋ maki ħuɣal puinas~ɕailis~ɕ, kwara s~ɕquliq na puinas~ɕailis~ɕ kaki qutux s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨujɣam maŋ s~ɕquliq. mntos~ɕa, tukuma, lapulata, matpulata, s~ɕaʔta ru s~ɕŋβe ħmzinas~ɕ miman maŋ s~ɕquliq uzi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Argentina hya' ga cyux maki' tay 34 00 S, 64 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2,780,400 sq km (maki' tay 8ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,736,690 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 43,710 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 43,886,748. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 53.90%, lhlahuy hya' ga 10.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 35.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Buenos Aires. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 25 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mauricio Macri, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Plahang hi' nbu Ka hum squliq pklahang nbu ru, ptyuw na sehu, ru pbetaqan ru plahang hi nbu na pawsian rmaw, hminas cyugal kbhun buying msqutux mtzywaw, cyugal ga sazin baq p'baq, phzinas smka na squliq ga sasisio mtyuaw. plahang hi' nbu kuoka mlahang kwaraq squliq, ana binah na squliq uzi, nanu yasa haki lhinhay na qalan, qzinuq na squliq ga khangun nay uzi. Smsum zywaw sinbilan Sibilant zywaw na Akntiy kahun ta Ocuo, pzyux kahun binah qlang na squkiq snsum nha zywaw pkcingay gaga na Alntiy. Quni haw'luis, bohs kmayan, squliq na Akntiy ga kman ke sibonya na squliq itali: "Krani nha minaki paliy na squliq na inkuko." lozi ga, squliq na kuwciaw qnzyat mtuyuw qnxan nha ga. mnglung cikay qanxan na gaga Akntiy la. Zmagan nniqun na ocuo krryax ga, wayay itali, siangciang, ru sbing pang, squliq Aknting smoya maniq nniqun na cinhyan uzim ru kriauw na nniqun, kwaraq smuling sueciaw pyanhniqun na qalang Aknting smuling sianm (Asado) ru loklo, loklo ga nbox na qetun. layan sianm yacung ru topu. Umita ga nbox na qetun, layan yacung laciaou waralng kblayan nha niwan snabu niqun qalang qani kian na talaha sianm htgan na cinbwanan alinh srara psuyx balay hisiam slingun na, Aknting pyangbalay ga na Itali kcing miy, guys hi ktuaw kacin, guys kacin, pyah na Itali ru hmyaq pyah skitu na miluku ga. Ktan krryax niqan pyanh sbing, tuangan pyahh ciawkli skitu na miluku ru bway giram, sinpamya balay nha uzi, qwau sgnaw Aknting ga pyang balay na cinbwanan, yasa qu pyang sgleng na maniqi sazi qa pyang nbun qu qalang Aknting ma'pek tolot csiacu sila satang ga syon kwaea qalang. Nnbun matay ga muci qutux nbun Aknting lozi, maki pqwasam, slayn llgam ru ana nanu na slayn. Hugal Aknting ga hminas balay hugal na qutux qalang, kbhul ga qelu pqan maki hugal qu squliq, mopu hupa na hugal kian smka na squliq na qalang, Musa maki cuygan kbhul mang na squlang maki hugal puinasailis, kwara squliq na puinasailis kaki qutux seng cuygam mang squliq. mntosa, Tukuma, lapulata, matpulata, sa'ta ru sngbe hmzinas miman mang squliq uzi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: arɣentina ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** s~ɕ, ** ** w na nan-meʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βuenos~ɕ aires~ɕ. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mauriʦ~ʨio maʦ~ʨri, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. plaħaŋ ħiʔ nβu ka ħum s~ɕquliq pklaħaŋ nβu ru, ptjuw na s~ɕeħu, ru pβetaqan ru plaħaŋ ħi nβu na paws~ɕian rmaw, ħminas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħun βujiŋ ms~ɕqutux mtzjwaw, ʦ~ʨjuɣal ɣa s~ɕazin βaq pʔβaq, pħzinas~ɕ s~ɕmka na s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕas~ɕis~ɕio mtjuaw. plaħaŋ ħiʔ nβu kuoka mlaħaŋ kwaraq s~ɕquliq, ana βinaħ na s~ɕquliq uzi, nanu jas~ɕa ħaki lħinħaj na qalan, qzinuq na s~ɕquliq ɣa kħaŋun naj uzi. s~ɕms~ɕum zjwaw s~ɕinβilan s~ɕiβilant zjwaw na akntij kaħun ta oʦ~ʨuo, pzjux kaħun βinaħ qlaŋ na s~ɕqukiq s~ɕns~ɕum nħa zjwaw pkʦ~ʨiŋaj ɣaɣa na alntij. quni ħawʔluis~ɕ, βoħs~ɕ kmajan, s~ɕquliq na akntij ɣa kman ke s~ɕiβonja na s~ɕquliq itali: "krani nħa minaki palij na s~ɕquliq na inkuko." lozi ɣa, s~ɕquliq na kuwʦ~ʨiaw qnzjat mtujuw qnxan nħa ɣa. mŋluŋ ʦ~ʨikaj qanxan na ɣaɣa akntij la. zmaɣan nniqun na oʦ~ʨuo krrjax ɣa, wajaj itali, s~ɕiaŋʦ~ʨiaŋ, ru s~ɕβiŋ paŋ, s~ɕquliq akntiŋ s~ɕmoja maniq nniqun na ʦ~ʨinħjan uzim ru kriauw na nniqun, kwaraq s~ɕmuliŋ s~ɕueʦ~ʨiaw pjanħniqun na qalaŋ akntiŋ s~ɕmuliŋ s~ɕianm (as~ɕa*o) ru loklo, loklo ɣa nβox na qetun. lajan s~ɕianm jaʦ~ʨuŋ ru topu. umita ɣa nβox na qetun, lajan jaʦ~ʨuŋ laʦ~ʨiaou waralŋ kβlajan nħa niwan s~ɕnaβu niqun qalaŋ qani kian na talaħa s~ɕianm ħtɣan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan alinħ s~ɕrara ps~ɕujx βalaj ħis~ɕiam s~ɕliŋun na, akntiŋ pjaŋβalaj ɣa na itali kʦ~ʨiŋ mij, ɣujs~ɕ ħi ktuaw kaʦ~ʨin, ɣujs~ɕ kaʦ~ʨin, pjaħ na itali ru ħmjaq pjaħ s~ɕkitu na miluku ɣa. ktan krrjax niqan pjanħ s~ɕβiŋ, tuaŋan pjaħħ ʦ~ʨiawkli s~ɕkitu na miluku ru βwaj ɣiram, s~ɕinpamja βalaj nħa uzi, qwau s~ɕɣnaw akntiŋ ɣa pjaŋ βalaj na ʦ~ʨinβwanan, jas~ɕa qu pjaŋ s~ɕɣleŋ na maniqi s~ɕazi qa pjaŋ nβun qu qalaŋ akntiŋ maʔpek tolot ʦ~ʨs~ɕiaʦ~ʨu s~ɕila s~ɕataŋ ɣa s~ɕjon kwaea qalaŋ. nnβun mataj ɣa muʦ~ʨi qutux nβun akntiŋ lozi, maki pqwas~ɕam, s~ɕlajn llɣam ru ana nanu na s~ɕlajn. ħuɣal akntiŋ ɣa ħminas~ɕ βalaj ħuɣal na qutux qalaŋ, kβħul ɣa qelu pqan maki ħuɣal qu s~ɕquliq, mopu ħupa na ħuɣal kian s~ɕmka na s~ɕquliq na qalaŋ, mus~ɕa maki ʦ~ʨujɣan kβħul maŋ na s~ɕqulaŋ maki ħuɣal puinas~ɕailis~ɕ, kwara s~ɕquliq na puinas~ɕailis~ɕ kaki qutux s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨujɣam maŋ s~ɕquliq. mntos~ɕa, tukuma, lapulata, matpulata, s~ɕaʔta ru s~ɕŋβe ħmzinas~ɕ miman maŋ s~ɕquliq uzi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
